PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?athlete ?athleteLabel(YEAR(?eventDate) - YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?age) WHERE {
  ?commonwealthGames wdt:P31 wd:Q2529493 ; rdfs:label ?commonwealthLabel ; wdt:P585 ?commonwealthDate .
  FILTER(LANG(?commonwealthLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?commonwealthLabel) , '2010 commonwealth games'))
  FILTER(YEAR(?commonwealthDate) = 2010)
  ?wrestlingEvent wdt:P31 wd:Q2529493 ; wdt:P178 ?commonwealthGames ; rdfs:label ?wrestlingLabel ; wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(LANG(?wrestlingLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?wrestlingLabel) , 'greco roman'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?wrestlingLabel) , '60 kg'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?wrestlingLabel) , 'men'))
  ?result wdt:P178 ?wrestlingEvent ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q202846 ; wdt:P179 ?athlete .
  ?athlete wdt:P27 wd:Q23977 ; wdt:P569 ?birthDate ; rdfs:label ?athleteLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?athleteLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2010)
}
